Shivala in the evening hours to look for her brother Himanshu. On 
the way, she passed respondent No. 1 Hare Ram Sah’s room and 
inquired if he had seen her brother. The said respondent pointed 
towards an inner room (used as coaching center) and suggested to 
the victim that her brother had gone in that direction. She went to 
check inside the room and found no one there. At the same time, 
Hare Ram Sah came from behind and grabbed her. She deposed 
that he took her inside and raped her. He also threatened her by
